name: @tellegen/engine
description: Browser engine package for tellegen case parsing, solving, studies, previews, and sensitivities.

scripts.build: npm run contracts:check && tsc -p tsconfig.json && node scripts/copy-wasm-assets.mjs
scripts.wasm: npm run wasm:core && npm run wasm:sens
scripts.wasm:core: RUSTFLAGS="-C target-feature=-simd128,-relaxed-simd" wasm-pack build ../../crates/tellegen-wasm --target web --out-dir ../../packages/engine/src/wasm-pkg --out-name tellegen -- --no-default-features
